attributes.name: Create Your Own Adventure V4
attributes.summary: The CreateYourOwnAdventureV4 module defines a card-based structure for managing customizable adventure games with a focus on user interface updates. Its core functions include setting up an adventure by linking scenarios or creating a one-shot narrative, managing game state (setup, playing, completed), and facilitating interactive storytelling with turn management. It provides embedded components for displaying adventures compactly and a full UI presentation with scenario selection, story narration, image generation, and chat integration. The primary purpose is to enable users to craft, run, and interact with personalized adventure narratives within a card-based UI, supporting multimedia elements and real-time communication features.
